# databcrd

The goal of {databcrd} is to make the data shared by the Central Bank of
the Dominican Republic (DR) accessible to R users via an R packages.
With the the functions contained in this package, downloading, cleaning
and importing data about DR economy will be simple.

## Installation

You can install the development version of databcrd like so:

``` r
remotes::install_github("johan-rosa/databcrd")
```

# Package index

## All functions

- [`crear_mes()`](https://johan-rosa.github.io/databcrd/reference/crear_mes.md)
  : Change month encoding
- [`data_ipc_articulos_2020_2024`](https://johan-rosa.github.io/databcrd/reference/data_ipc_articulos_2020_2024.md)
  : CPI by item data, from October 2020 to December 2024
- [`data_ipc_articulos_long_2010_2024`](https://johan-rosa.github.io/databcrd/reference/data_ipc_articulos_long_2010_2024.md)
  : CPI by item data, from 2010 to December 2024
- [`date_label()`](https://johan-rosa.github.io/databcrd/reference/date_label.md)
  : Create date label
- [`expectativas_details`](https://johan-rosa.github.io/databcrd/reference/expectativas_details.md)
  : Utility complement to handle the macroeconomic expectations
- [`exports_details`](https://johan-rosa.github.io/databcrd/reference/exports_details.md)
  : Utility complement to handle the total exports data
- [`fiscal_details`](https://johan-rosa.github.io/databcrd/reference/fiscal_details.md)
  : Utility complement to handle the total imports data
- [`get_ecc()`](https://johan-rosa.github.io/databcrd/reference/get_ecc.md)
  : Get ECC
- [`get_eem()`](https://johan-rosa.github.io/databcrd/reference/get_eem.md)
  : Get EEM
- [`get_embi()`](https://johan-rosa.github.io/databcrd/reference/get_embi.md)
  : Download EMBI
- [`get_encaje()`](https://johan-rosa.github.io/databcrd/reference/get_encaje.md)
  : Download legal reserve serie
- [`get_eoe()`](https://johan-rosa.github.io/databcrd/reference/get_eoe.md)
  : Get EOE
- [`get_expectativas()`](https://johan-rosa.github.io/databcrd/reference/get_expectativas.md)
  : Macroeconomic Expectations
- [`get_exportaciones()`](https://johan-rosa.github.io/databcrd/reference/get_exportaciones.md)
  : Total exports by sectors
- [`get_exportaciones_zf()`](https://johan-rosa.github.io/databcrd/reference/get_exportaciones_zf.md)
  : Free Trade Exports
- [`get_fbkf()`](https://johan-rosa.github.io/databcrd/reference/get_fbkf.md)
  : Download GROSS FIXED CAPITAL FORMATION BY SECTOR AND TYPE OF GOOD
- [`get_fiscal()`](https://johan-rosa.github.io/databcrd/reference/get_fiscal.md)
  : Download Statement of Operations of the non-financial public sector
- [`get_ied()`](https://johan-rosa.github.io/databcrd/reference/get_ied.md)
  : Foreign direct investment to the Dominican Republic
- [`get_imae()`](https://johan-rosa.github.io/databcrd/reference/get_imae.md)
  : Monthly Economic Activity Indicator, base 2018
- [`get_imae_2007()`](https://johan-rosa.github.io/databcrd/reference/get_imae_2007.md)
  : Monthly Economic Activity Indicator, base 2007
- [`get_importaciones()`](https://johan-rosa.github.io/databcrd/reference/get_importaciones.md)
  : Total imports by sectors
- [`get_importaciones_petroleo()`](https://johan-rosa.github.io/databcrd/reference/get_importaciones_petroleo.md)
  : Oil Imports
- [`get_indicadores_monetarios_bcrd()`](https://johan-rosa.github.io/databcrd/reference/get_indicadores_monetarios_bcrd.md)
  : Monetary Indicators of the Central Bank of the Dominican Republic
- [`get_ipc_articulos()`](https://johan-rosa.github.io/databcrd/reference/get_ipc_articulos.md)
  : Download the CPI series at item level
- [`get_ipc_data()`](https://johan-rosa.github.io/databcrd/reference/get_ipc_data.md)
  : Download the CPI series
- [`get_ipc_general()`](https://johan-rosa.github.io/databcrd/reference/get_ipc_general.md)
  : To get the general CPI data
- [`get_ipc_grupos()`](https://johan-rosa.github.io/databcrd/reference/get_ipc_grupos.md)
  : To get the CPI data by group of goods and services
- [`get_ipc_long()`](https://johan-rosa.github.io/databcrd/reference/get_ipc_long.md)
  : Download the CPI series in long format
- [`get_ipc_regiones()`](https://johan-rosa.github.io/databcrd/reference/get_ipc_regiones.md)
  : To get the CPI data by geographic region
- [`get_ipc_subyacente()`](https://johan-rosa.github.io/databcrd/reference/get_ipc_subyacente.md)
  : To get the CPI core inflation data
- [`get_ipc_tnt()`](https://johan-rosa.github.io/databcrd/reference/get_ipc_tnt.md)
  : To get the CPI data by transferable or not
- [`get_pib_gasto()`](https://johan-rosa.github.io/databcrd/reference/get_pib_gasto.md)
  : GDP by the expenditure approach, both real and nominal
- [`get_pib_sectores()`](https://johan-rosa.github.io/databcrd/reference/get_pib_sectores.md)
  : GDP by the sector of origin, both real and nominal
- [`get_prestamos_osd()`](https://johan-rosa.github.io/databcrd/reference/get_prestamos_osd.md)
  : Download the loans by sector series
- [`get_remesas()`](https://johan-rosa.github.io/databcrd/reference/get_remesas.md)
  : Remittances to the Dominican Republic
- [`get_remesas_avg()`](https://johan-rosa.github.io/databcrd/reference/get_remesas_avg.md)
  : Get average of remittances
- [`get_remesas_cnt()`](https://johan-rosa.github.io/databcrd/reference/get_remesas_cnt.md)
  : Get quantity of transactions of remittances
- [`get_remesas_currency()`](https://johan-rosa.github.io/databcrd/reference/get_remesas_currency.md)
  : Get remittances by currency
- [`get_remesas_epa()`](https://johan-rosa.github.io/databcrd/reference/get_remesas_epa.md)
  : Get remittances by payment company
- [`get_remesas_genero()`](https://johan-rosa.github.io/databcrd/reference/get_remesas_genero.md)
  : Get remittances by gender
- [`get_remesas_mensuales()`](https://johan-rosa.github.io/databcrd/reference/get_remesas_mensuales.md)
  : Get the monthly remittances
- [`get_remesas_pais()`](https://johan-rosa.github.io/databcrd/reference/get_remesas_pais.md)
  : Get remittances by country
- [`get_remesas_provincias()`](https://johan-rosa.github.io/databcrd/reference/get_remesas_provincias.md)
  : Get remittances by provinces
- [`get_tasas_activas()`](https://johan-rosa.github.io/databcrd/reference/get_tasas_activas.md)
  : Download interest rates for loans
- [`get_tasas_pasivas()`](https://johan-rosa.github.io/databcrd/reference/get_tasas_pasivas.md)
  : Download interest rates for savings
- [`get_tc()`](https://johan-rosa.github.io/databcrd/reference/get_tc.md)
  : Average exchange rate of the operations in financial institutions
- [`get_tc_eif()`](https://johan-rosa.github.io/databcrd/reference/get_tc_eif.md)
  : Average exchange rate of the operations in financial institutions
- [`get_tc_spot()`](https://johan-rosa.github.io/databcrd/reference/get_tc_spot.md)
  : Exchange rates in the spot market of the Dominican Republic
- [`get_tpm()`](https://johan-rosa.github.io/databcrd/reference/get_tpm.md)
  : Series of the Monetary Policy Rate of the Dominican Republic
- [`imports_details`](https://johan-rosa.github.io/databcrd/reference/imports_details.md)
  : Utility complement to handle the total imports data
- [`indicadores_bcrd_details`](https://johan-rosa.github.io/databcrd/reference/indicadores_bcrd_details.md)
  : Utility complement to handle the monetary indicators data
- [`ipc_articulos_details`](https://johan-rosa.github.io/databcrd/reference/ipc_articulos_details.md)
  : Utility complement to handle the CPI by item
- [`read_details()`](https://johan-rosa.github.io/databcrd/reference/read_details.md)
  : Function to read files metadata
- [`rescale()`](https://johan-rosa.github.io/databcrd/reference/rescale.md)
  : change the scale of a vector

  Data](https://johan-rosa.github.io/databcrd/articles/ipc_data.md):
